# gha-release-protobuf — Additional Context

Org-wide coding standards (file headers, language rules, commit format) are at
**https://github.com/falkcorp/.github** and apply automatically to this repo.

For full project context: **CLAUDE.md** at the repo root.

## Project overview

GHA composite action: Protocol Buffer composite release. Language: Shell/YAML.
This action handles protobuf compilation and release automation as a reusable
GitHub Actions composite action.
